Style card for translating into Japanese.

## Register

Default to 敬語 (keigo) for formal documents; use plain form for casual content.

## Pronouns

Avoid overuse — Japanese routinely omits subjects when context is clear.

## Common pitfalls

- Literal rendering of English "you" — usually dropped or replaced with name/title
- Overusing commas where Japanese prefers particles
